content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "NEUTRAL",
    "reasoning": "Nifty flat at 24016 with VIX 17.82 — choppy market with sector rotation into Pharma (+2.16%), defence/capital goods, and Financial Services on Q4 prints. Energy lagging. Book is fully deployed (67%) with 13 positions, most just entered today; priority is risk management on existing book, not new entries. HFCL OPEN order from earlier needs cancellation given price has moved away.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23950,
      "nifty_resistance": 24250
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1030.00,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+6.1% unrealized, but SL already at 1030 (above entry 984 — locked +4.7% gain). CMP 1045.60, SL 1030 is 1.5% below CMP — within trail-gap discipline. Strong fundamentals (Q4 PAT +18%, GNPA sub-1%, RBI easing tailwind). HOLD current SL — already tightened above entry, no further trail needed yet."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Hedge position, -1.0% on entry, CMP recovering to 124.05. SL 119 (-3.9% from CMP) gives room. Gold MACD bearish but holding above SMA20. Hedge intact, hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1710.00,
      "new_target": 1800.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+1.4%, SL already at 1710 (above entry 1700, locked +0.6%). CMP 1727.70 — SL 1710 is 1.0% below CMP, exactly at trail-gap floor. No-op MODIFY would be wasted; emitting HOLD instead. Correction: HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-1.6%, near SL 206 (CMP 206.48). Q4 PAT +68%, NIM 6.2% — fundamentals strong. Letting SL do its job; if it triggers at 206, exit is automatic. Not tightening further (would self-stopout). Election risk in WB/Assam noted but not catalytic today."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 4600.00,
      "new_target": 4875.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+1.1%, SL already at 4600 (above entry 4575). CMP 4635, SL 4600 is 0.76% below — TIGHTER than 1% trail-gap floor. To respect floor, leaving SL at 4600 is acceptable since it's at entry+, not actively trailing. Q4 results May 14 (8 sessions away — outside 3-session binary window). HOLD current levels."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+1.8%, SL 6960 above entry 6900. CMP 7022, SL 6960 is 0.88% below CMP — slightly inside 1% trail-gap floor but already at entry+. Q4 PAT +114%, EBITDA margin 34.3%, Geojit TP 8500. Strong setup; let it run. No SL change."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 825.00,
      "new_target": 900.00,
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+0.3%, SL 825 below entry 838. CMP 842.45 — gain insufficient (<2%) to trail to breakeven yet. Massive May 5 volume (9.5% equity) flagged as potential block-deal/promoter distribution risk. HOLD current SL; if it gives up gains, SL absorbs."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-0.8%, CMP 366.95 vs entry 369. Q4 PAT +30%, AUM strong, brokerage upgrades. SL 358 (-2.4% from CMP) gives room. Hold; thesis intact."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 815.00,
      "new_target": 855.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+1.1%, SL 815 below entry 820. Strong Q4 (PAT +18%, India volume +9% leading FMCG). Gain too small to trail to BE yet. HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "M&M",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-1.3%, near SL 3245 (CMP 3255). Q4 PAT +42%, dividend +30%. Position uncomfortable but SL gives 0.3% room — let it work. Not tightening (would self-stopout)."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+0.9%, SL 1265 above entry 1259. CMP 1278.30 — SL is 1.04% below CMP, just at trail-gap floor. Q4 revenue +30%, Encora deal closed. Gain too small to trail further. HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-1.3%, CMP 3010 vs entry 3025. Defence shipbuilding momentum, FY26 EBITDA margin +330 bps. SL 2950 gives 2% room. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-0.3%, CMP 806.40 vs entry 806. Q4 record EBITDA margin 46.5%, AuM +21%. SL 780 (-3.3%) gives room. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "HFCL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "MIS",
      "confidence": 0.40,
      "timeframe": "INTRADAY",
      "reasoning": "Existing OPEN MIS BUY @ 133.50 from 8 hours ago hasn't filled — price has likely moved away. Per ORDER HYGIENE, should cancel rather than stack. Note: schema doesn't expose CANCEL action here; flagging for portfolio_notes. Will not stack second order. Treat as effectively dead — at 12:50 with MIS cutoff approaching (2:30 PM new orders, 3:10 PM force close), this LIMIT will likely auto-cancel or fill against an unfavorable bounce."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {"symbol": "PNBHOUSING", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 1030.00, "reasoning": "SL already above entry, locked +4.7% gain"},
    {"symbol": "GOLDBEES", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 119.00, "reasoning": "Hedge position, SL gives room"},
    {"symbol": "ADANIPORTS", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 1710.00, "reasoning": "SL at entry+, exactly at 1% trail-gap floor"},
    {"symbol": "BANDHANBNK", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 206.00, "reasoning": "Near SL — let stop do its job"},
    {"symbol": "HAL", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 4600.00, "reasoning": "SL above entry; Q4 results May 14"},
    {"symbol": "NAVINFLUOR", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 6960.00, "reasoning": "SL above entry, strong Q4 momentum"},
    {"symbol": "TITAGARH", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 825.00, "reasoning": "Gain too small to trail"},
    {"symbol": "ABCAPITAL", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 358.00, "reasoning": "Strong Q4, thesis intact"},
    {"symbol": "MARICO", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 815.00, "reasoning": "Gain too small to trail to BE"},
    {"symbol": "M&M", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 3245.00, "reasoning": "Near SL, let it work"},
    {"symbol": "COFORGE", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 1265.00, "reasoning": "SL above entry, at trail-gap floor"},
    {"symbol": "GRSE", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 2950.00, "reasoning": "Defence momentum intact"},
    {"symbol": "CAMS", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 780.00, "reasoning": "Q4 record margins, hold"}
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "LAURUSLABS, AUROPHARMA, WOCKPHARMA — pharma momentum strong but book already at 67% deployed with 13 names; no room for new pharma without trim. Watch for pullback entries next session if book frees up. CAMS / COFORGE could be added to if pullback to entry zone, but no incremental capital available now.",
  "portfolio_notes": "13 positions, 67% deployed, INR 131k remaining deployable but spreading thin would dilute focus. Book is loaded with today's Q4-driven entries — priority is letting these work, not adding more. CRITICAL: HFCL OPEN MIS LIMIT BUY @133.50 from 8 hours ago is stale order hygiene risk — flagging for explicit cancellation. Cluster check: 3 financials (PNBHOUSING, ABCAPITAL, CAMS) + 1 bank (BANDHANBNK) = ~26% in financial-services cluster, near 35% sector cap. 2 capital goods (HAL, GRSE, TITAGARH) = ~17%. Sector concentrations within bounds but no further additions to either cluster. Win rate 15% over 5 days is poor — focus on letting today's high-quality Q4-catalyst entries run rather than churning."
}
